title: Secretary Statements & Remarks | U.S. Department of the Treasury
summary: This is a listing/index page that aggregates titles and dates of remarks by Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent from December 2025 through March 2026. No substantive content from any individual speech or statement is provided in this page. The page serves only as a navigation index to separate documents.
key_points: Page type is a listing/navigation page, not an archiveable document
No substantive policy content is present in this source
Lists 10 dated entries from Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent covering December 2025 to March 2026
Notable titles include 'A Reset on Liquidity Regulation' (February 20, 2026) and congressional testimony (January 28, February 4, 2026)
Individual documents would need to be accessed separately for substantive content
why_it_matters: This listing page has no standalone value for research. However, it identifies specific Treasury Secretary speeches that may contain market-structure relevant content (e.g., 'A Reset on Liquidity Regulation') and congressional testimony on financial services that could be macro-relevant. The individual documents must be retrieved separately.
notes: This source is NOT relevant to market structure or macro catalysts in its current form because it is a navigation page with no substantive content. Per CORE RULE #6, listing pages should be treated as non-archiveable. The page lists 10 potential documents that may contain relevant content, but the actual speeches and statements are not included here. Recommend retrieving individual documents: (1) 'A Reset on Liquidity Regulation' February 20, 2026 - potentially market-structure relevant; (2) Senate Banking Committee statement February 4, 2026; (3) House Financial Services Committee statement January 28, 2026. Published dates on the listing range from December 17, 2025 to March 30, 2026.
